about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi!, I'm a developer recently graduated in <1>Web Application Development (DAW)</1>. My focus is on Frontend and Backend development, I enjoy turning ideas and designs into functional websites to showcase.
about.p2: Throughout my training I have acquired solid foundations in HTML, CSS and JavaScript, which I always try to improve and move forward. I am focusing on the <1>React</1> ecosystem for the frontend and <3>Node</3> for the backend.
